methods.description: This method involves preparing image data and training a Mask R-CNN model for instance segmentation of pollen grains and tubes.

steps.description: 500 original and 100 synthetic images were prepared with a size of 692 × 520 pixels at 300 dpi.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare original and synthetic images for training

steps.description: 600 images were manually labeled by Make Sense and subjected to data augmentation.
steps.searchable_summary: label images and apply data augmentation

steps.description: Data augmentation included horizontal flipping, vertical flipping, brightness adjustment, Gaussian blur, and salt and pepper noise.
The Mask R-CNN algorithm was selected to perform instance segmentation of pollen grains and pollen tubes.
steps.searchable_summary: train Mask R-CNN model for instance segmentation

steps.description: Validation loss, mean average precision (mAP), and accuracy were calculated to assess the model quality.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate validation metrics for model assessment

methods.description: This method evaluates the model's performance by comparing predictions with ground truth data using various metrics.

steps.description: Scatter plots comparing ground truth and model predictions for four indexes were created.
steps.searchable_summary: create scatter plots for model evaluation

steps.description: Mean average precision (mAP) and accuracy values at various IoU thresholds were calculated.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate mAP and accuracy at different IoU thresholds

methods.method_name: Model Performance on Pollen Grain and Pollen Tube Segmentation
methods.description: This method describes the segmentation performance of the model on test images, including processing time and output types.

steps.description: The input image was processed by the proposed model for ~26 s.
steps.searchable_summary: process input image using trained model

steps.description: Outputted as a raw output, binary image of pollen tube masks, and skeletonized image of pollen tubes.
steps.searchable_summary: generate raw, binary, and skeletonized images

steps.description: The predicted number of pollen grains and pollen tubes was automatically counted and outputted.
steps.searchable_summary: count and output predicted pollen grains and tubes

steps.description: Pollen tube length was calculated according to the scale.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate pollen tube length from skeletonized image

methods.description: This method evaluates the model's practical application in detecting pollen tubes at different developmental stages.

steps.description: Images of developing pollen tubes were captured at four time points within 3 h of tree peony pollen culture.
steps.searchable_summary: capture images of developing pollen tubes

steps.description: Pollen germination frequency and average length of the pollen tubes were calculated by manual counting and model prediction.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate pollen germination frequency and tube length

steps.description: The model's predictions were compared with the ground truth at four time points.
steps.searchable_summary: compare model predictions with ground truth
